## For investigation profiles

- [ ] Every claim has a primary source URL
- [ ] Sources are government records, court filings, or established journalism
- [ ] Tone is descriptive, not editorial
- [ ] Profile slug follows the convention (lowercase, hyphenated)
- [ ] `ON CONFLICT (brand_slug) DO UPDATE` in any SQL

## For chain exclusions

- [ ] Entries are lowercase
- [ ] Correct `match_type` (exact vs. contains)
- [ ] Country codes added where appropriate
